llm_raw.summary: Critical regulatory elements are missing: no bilingual nicotine warning at the top, no 18+ icon, and no risk communication at the bottom. The ZONNIC logo is present and appears correct, but the asset fails mandatory legal requirements. Logo, color, and background checks pass, but regulatory compliance is not met. Manual review is needed for font verification and logo safety zone.

violations.rule_text: Every marketing asset MUST include a bilingual nicotine warning statement banner at the TOP of the creative.
violations.issue: No nicotine warning statement detected at the top of the image.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add a bilingual nicotine warning banner at the top: 'WARNING: This product contains nicotine. Nicotine is highly addictive. Only to be used by adults who are trying to quit smoking.' and 'AVERTISSEMENT : Ce produit contient de la nicotine. La nicotine crée une forte dépendance. À utiliser uniquement par des adultes qui désirent cesser de fumer.'
violations.evidence: No warning text detected via OCR or vision signals at the top.

violations.rule_text: The nicotine warning banner must be positioned at the TOP of the asset. The risk communication and 18+ icon must be at the BOTTOM. This placement is consistent across all compliant examples in the guidelines.
violations.issue: Required regulatory elements (nicotine warning, risk communication, 18+ icon) are missing and not positioned as required.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add nicotine warning at the top, risk communication and 18+ icon at the bottom.
violations.evidence: No regulatory text or icon detected at top or bottom via OCR or shape detection.

violations.rule_text: The nicotine warning must appear in BOTH English and French on every asset. English uses 'WARNING:', French uses 'AVERTISSEMENT :'.
violations.issue: No bilingual warning detected; neither English nor French warning text present.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add both English and French nicotine warning statements at the top of the asset.

violations.rule_text: The 18+ icon must be present on marketing materials to indicate age restriction.
violations.issue: No 18+ age restriction icon detected anywhere in the image.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add a circular 18+ icon at the bottom of the asset.
violations.evidence: No '18+' text or circular icon detected via shape or text analysis.

violations.rule_text: Every marketing asset MUST include risk communication text at the BOTTOM of the creative.
violations.issue: No risk communication text detected at the bottom of the image.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add 'This product may not be right for you. Always read and follow the label.' at the bottom of the asset.
violations.evidence: No risk communication text detected via OCR at the bottom.
